title: hieracium distinctum
intro: Hieracium distinctum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The medicinal properties of Hieracium distinctum have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Hieracium distinctum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
